info.title: POTAL - Total Landed Cost Calculator
info.description: Calculate the true total cost of cross-border purchases including import duties, taxes, and shipping fees for 240 countries and territories. Includes sanctions screening (OFAC SDN + CSL 21K entries), FTA lookup (63 agreements), AI HS classification, and processing fees for 12 countries. Multi-language support (50 languages).

post.summary: Calculate the total landed cost for a product being shipped internationally
post.description: Given a product price, origin country, destination country, and optional details like shipping cost and product name, calculates the full landed cost including import duties, VAT/GST, customs processing fees, and any applicable taxes. Returns a detailed breakdown of all costs.

price.description: Product price in the origin country's typical selling currency (USD equivalent). Example: 49.99

shippingPrice.description: Shipping cost in USD. Default: 0. Example: 8.50

origin.description: Origin country as 2-letter ISO code. Examples: CN (China), DE (Germany), JP (Japan), IT (Italy), GB (United Kingdom)

destinationCountry.description: Destination country as 2-letter ISO code. Examples: US, GB, DE, CA, AU, JP, FR, KR

zipcode.description: Destination ZIP/postal code. Required for US destinations to calculate state sales tax. Example: 10001

productName.description: Name of the product for automatic HS Code classification. Examples: Cotton T-Shirt, Laptop, Running Shoes, Leather Handbag

productCategory.description: Product category to help with classification. Examples: electronics, apparel, footwear, accessories, food

hsCode.description: If known, the HS Code (Harmonized System) for precise duty calculation. Example: 6109.10 (cotton t-shirts)

200.description: Successful calculation with full cost breakdown

totalLandedCost.description: Total cost the buyer will pay including all duties, taxes, and fees

isDutyFree.description: Whether the item qualifies for duty-free treatment

breakdown.description: Detailed breakdown of each cost component

get.summary: Get a list of all supported countries with their tax and duty information
get.description: Returns all 240 supported countries with VAT/GST rates, average duty rates, de minimis thresholds, and currency information. Supports multi-language country names via ?lang= parameter (50 languages).

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Language code for country names. Supports 50 languages: en, ko, ja, zh, es, fr, de, pt, it, ru, ar, hi, th, vi, id, tr, pl, nl, sv, da, fi, no, cs, ro, hu, uk, el, he, ms, bg, etc.

200.description: List of 240 supported countries with tax details and localized names

post.summary: Screen a party against sanctions and denied-party lists
post.description: Check a person or entity name against OFAC SDN, BIS Entity List, CSL, and other sanctions databases (21,301 total entries from 19 sources). Returns match results with confidence scores.

name.description: Person or entity name to screen. Example: 'Huawei Technologies'

country.description: Country ISO2 code to narrow results. Example: 'CN'

lists.description: Specific lists to check. Default: all. Options: OFAC_SDN, BIS_ENTITY, BIS_DPL, STATE_DTC, etc.

get.summary: Look up Free Trade Agreements between two countries
get.description: Check if a Free Trade Agreement exists between origin and destination countries. Returns FTA name, preferential duty rates, and rules of origin requirements. Covers 63 FTAs.

parameters.name: hsCode
parameters.description: HS code for product-specific FTA rate. Example: '6109.10'

200.description: FTA details and preferential rates if applicable

post.summary: AI-powered HS code classification for a product
post.description: Classify a product into an HS (Harmonized System) code using a 3-stage AI pipeline: vector search, keyword matching, and LLM classification. Returns HS code, description, and confidence level.

productName.description: Product name or description. Example: 'cotton t-shirt', 'laptop computer'

200.description: HS code classification result with confidence
